overall.description: A first-person walk through a rain-soaked futuristic waterfront promenade in Night City from Cyberpunk 2077. The scene features heavy rainfall, vibrant neon advertisements reflecting off wet surfaces, and pedestrians taking shelter under awnings. The camera moves from an open waterfront railing past a green-haired character on their phone, along the promenade lined with holographic billboards, and finally into a covered outdoor seating area with checkered flooring.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront promenade with metal safety railing

events.description: camera pans left to reveal a green-haired character standing by the railing
passing the stationary character and continuing along the wet walkway

agents.ego_description: walking along the waterfront railing in heavy rain, observing the neon-lit city across the water

notable_agents.action: standing by the railing looking at a phone, wearing a green jacket and distinctive green hair

entered.detail: black metal safety railing running along the waterfront edge
cylindrical public trash can with some scattered debris around its base
elevated roadway or monorail track with string lights visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rain-soaked waterfront promenade at night, with heavy rain falling on concrete surfaces. A metal railing lines the right side overlooking the water, while a green-haired character stands near a trash can looking at their phone. The camera pans left to reveal the character before continuing past them along the walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: open promenade lined with holographic billboards

events.description: large illuminated billboards for COLA and other brands become prominent on the left
camera tilts upward to view the towering glass skyscrapers with cyan and purple lighting

agents.ego_description: continuing along the wet promenade, passing illuminated advertisements and palm trees

entered.detail: large digital advertisements including COLA and other brands with bright illumination
tall futuristic skyscrapers with extensive glass facades lit with cyan and purple accent lighting
tropical palm trees lining the right side of the promenade
modern illuminated street lamps with bright vertical light strips

segments.scene_description: Moving past the waterfront character, the scene opens into a wide promenade lined with massive holographic billboards on the left and palm trees on the right. The camera walks steadily forward as tall glass office towers rise in the background, their windows glowing with cyan and purple light. Modern vertical light poles illuminate the rain-slicked concrete path.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial storefront with bright purple neon lighting

events.description: approaching a group of pedestrians gathered near a storefront with intense purple neon lighting

agents.ego_description: walking toward a group of people sheltering near a brightly lit store entrance

notable_agents.action: group of three people standing near the purple-lit entrance, one person appears to have a small dog

entered.detail: storefront facade with bright vertical purple neon strips and illuminated mannequins in the window
holographic advertisements projected onto the wet pavement reflecting the neon lights

segments.scene_description: The promenade narrows slightly as the camera approaches a commercial area featuring a storefront bathed in vibrant purple neon light. A group of pedestrians gathers near the entrance, partially sheltered from the rain. Holographic advertisements reflect off the wet tiled ground as the camera continues forward toward a covered seating area visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered outdoor dining area with bar seating and checkered floor

events.description: entering the covered outdoor seating area with distinctive yellow and blue checkered floor pattern
moving under the canopy reduces direct rain visibility and creates different light reflections on the glass railings

agents.ego_description: moving through the outdoor dining area, passing tables with seated patrons under the canopy

notable_agents.action: patrons sitting at high bar tables under the canopy, silhouetted against the bright NICOLA signage

entered.detail: overhead roof structure providing shelter from the rain with hanging light fixtures
distinctive yellow and blue checkered tile pattern covering the ground
transparent glass safety barrier with metal frame separating the walkway from the lower level
large illuminated 'NICOLA' brand sign on the back wall of the establishment
holographic floor advertisement for Kiroshi optics featuring animated graphics

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a covered outdoor dining area protected from the heavy rain by an overhead canopy. The floor features a striking yellow and blue checkered pattern, while glass railings line the right side. Patrons sit at tables under the shelter, and bright signage for 'NICOLA' illuminates the back wall. A holographic Kiroshi advertisement glows on the wet floor as the camera moves steadily through the space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey along a rain-drenched futuristic promenade that transitions from an open waterfront into a sheltered commercial plaza. It begins by panning past a green-haired character standing by a metal railing under heavy rainfall, before moving forward as the walkway opens into a wide boulevard. As the camera advances, the environment expands to reveal towering glass office towers and massive holographic billboards that cast cyan and purple light across the slick concrete. The scene then shifts toward a narrower commercial strip where vibrant purple neon storefronts and gathering pedestrians reflect off the wet tiles, leading the way toward a covered area. Finally, the camera moves under a protective canopy into an outdoor dining space, where the rain gives way to a yellow and blue checkered floor and glowing Kiroshi advertisements.
